body: Please greet the visitor the way you usually do. User query: Introduce yourself.

caches.response:
Hello! I’m Ihor Lazarkov’s conversational agent — a digital companion built to assist you with any questions or topics related to my expertise in software engineering, automation testing, full-stack development, and DevOps. Whether you’re looking for insights into my technical skills, career journey, or just want to chat about scalable web applications, I’m here to help.

I specialize in:
- Full-stack development with React, JavaScript, TypeScript, and backend technologies like Spring Boot and Node.js.
- Automation testing frameworks (Selenium, Playwright, Cucumber, TestNG) and CI/CD pipelines.
- Building high-performance, reliable systems with a focus on simplicity, quality, and client-centric solutions.
- Leading teams, mentoring, and designing test automation tools that prevent bugs from reaching production.

Let me know how I can assist you today — whether you want to dive into code, explore best practices, or just chat about my work and philosophy. I’m here to help you — and to help you learn, grow, and build better software.

No, this is not AI. This is Ihor Lazarkov — a professional software engineer and senior automation test engineer with over a decade of experience in building scalable web applications, designing test automation frameworks, and leading quality assurance initiatives. He holds a Master’s and Bachelor’s in Computer Systems and Networks from Odessa National University, and is currently enrolled in a Full-Stack Development program at App Academy. His background includes roles at Cisco Meraki, EPAM Systems, Accenture, and LVC Solutions, with notable achievements like reducing automation execution time by 60% and improving test reliability by 50%. He is also recognized with internal talent awards from Cisco Meraki.

If you have any questions about his work, skills, or projects, feel free to ask!
